name: @metaharness/evals-servedmodel
description: ruvllm served-model adapter for @metaharness/flywheel (ADR-234) — treats a distilled SONA/MicroLoRA adaptation policy as a flywheel candidate, gated through the frozen meetsPromotionRule plus a stricter forgetting-guard clause. Closes the unproven end-to-end piece of ADR-234 with a $0 synthetic proof; a real ruvllm serve run is a separate, explicitly labelled LIVE mode.
